title: Method
overview: A seasoned actor and a pop star are cast as leads in a gay romantic play. As the actor teaches the pop star method acting, the line between fiction and reality is blurred and they become drawn to each other.

trailers.title: Method | Official Trailer | GagaOOLala | Master and student fall in love in this Korean gay film!
